transcript: with you i tried to be perfect and keep you happy all the time but i didn't know that you wanted somebody else now i don't want nothing to do with you it's all right it's okay i don't need you anyway, so let me be, I'm doing fine Don't you waste your precious time I don't want, want you back Know you'll hurt, hurt me bad It's alright, it's okay, it's alright I did everything for you Even though you gave me nothing back I guess that I wasn't
